title: Carrier Truck Toys for Kids, 65inch & FoldableTransporter Truck Toy with 10 Cars (4 Pull Back Car+6 Race Car), Race Track Truck for Boy Kids, Toy Cars for 2-6 Year Olds Boy Gift for Birthday/Christmas
features: 【Super Value & Cool Transportation Truck Car Toys】Maysida super value toy car is both a car transporter toy and car track toy come with 10 racing cars. As the folded track is put down, children can enjoy an exciting racing competition on a 1.65 meters/65 inches super long double-track. Kids will soon be attracted by multi-play toy truck and colorful mini carts, no matter boys or girls.

【Fun Competition with Realistic Racing Cars】The newly upgraded transport car set include 10 small diecast cars toys, like race cars, convertibles and pull back cars (random style). Little racers can not only press the launcher to race on the ultra long dual tracks, but also on the ground to make pull back cars go anywhere! Through placing variety of cars in anywhere and press the spring buttons, toddler can improve their hand-eye coordination while recognize different types of vehicles.

【2-in-1 Foldable Design & Easy to Store】1.65 meters/65 inches car track set can be folded and turn into a transporter, which has three-tier and two sides with 12 storage spaces for die-cast cars toys. Moreover, the car carrier truck toy is designed with portable handle to carry easily for toddlers, so parents don't have to be afraid that mini cars are scattered all over the place and children can develop good habits of storage.

【Safe & High-quality & Drop Proof Car Set】Our oversized carrier cars set are made of non-toxic ABS plastic, the body of mini cars are made of high quality metal, which has passed thousands of anti-drop test. This toy truck is designed with 2 launchers that is no need battery and harmless for kids, just press the launch button to start an exciting high-speed racing competition. It’s so interesting and easy to operate for boys & girls who love car toy.

【Perfect Idea Gift for Kids】Kids will be attracted by the oversized transport truck because of colorful & cool racing cars, extra long racing track and multifunctional. For birthday, Children's Day, Christmas, Easter, holiday and Thanksgiving Day, our truck car must have been the first choice as a gift for boys and girls aged 3-7. Come and buy this first car transporter toy for your grandchildren/grandson/nieces/nephews/sons/daughters, let your children experience a fun & exciting racing game!
